item.title: Josh Johnson dropping words of wisdom into his comedy
item.description: If you aren't watching Josh Johnson's stand-up, you should be. It's wild to see someone being so funny and inspirational at the same time, especially with such a laid-back demeanor.
item.dc:creator: peekitty

item.title: Someone on reddit asked "Who is a person that everyone thought was crazy, but they ended being right?" Here are some of the responses.
item.description:
1..... https://www.reddit.com/r/AskReddit/comments/1azshde/who_is_a_person_that_everyone_thought_was_crazy/
2.....
3..... Rachel Carson https://www.environmentandsociety.org/exhibitions/rachel-carsons-silent-spring/personal-attacks-rachel-carson-woman-scientist
4.....
5..... Alfred Wegener https://rwu.pressbooks.pub/webboceanography/chapter/4-1-alfred-wegener-and-the-theory-of-plate-tectonics/
6.....
7.... Kotoku Wamura https://mymodernmet.com/kotoku-wamura-fudai-floodgate/
8.....
9..... Sinéad O'Connor https://www.standard.co.uk/culture/music/sinead-oconnor-death-a-life-in-activism-b1097080.html
10.....
11..... Gustave Caillebotte https://impressionist1877.tripod.com/caillebotte_bequest.htm
12.....
13..... Albert C. Barnes https://news.artnet.com/art-world/albert-barnes-angel-or-devil-2622244
14.....
15..... Hannibal Buress https://www.latimes.com/entertainment/tv/showtracker/la-et-st-hannibal-buress-cosby-joke-20151231-story.html
16.....
17..... Sister Elizabeth Kenny https://www.startribune.com/sister-elizabeth-kenny-a-raging-tiger-merciful-angel-who-challenged-the-doctors-on-polio/569952162 non paywall link: https://archive.ph/aTScl
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

I absolutely love this
Maybe love this more, gives me hope
10 outta 10
So sexy and loud and 70s suit mmmm

Maybe me
Also maybe me
And maybe me
Work me
This literally just happened to me
Love Germans ?
HAHAHAHAHAHA
Cat in the hat

item.title: NYC drone show
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/p/DH7M9B4NsV1/ "Last night, we turned one of the most legendary scenes in film history into a living moment above the Manhattan skyline. Thank you @empirestatebldg for making this happen. Show by @studiohock But this wasn’t just a visual stunt — it was a full-scale technical operation in one of the most challenging urban environments on the planet. To make it happen, we engineered Helios from the ground up. It’s our next-gen drone platform: ultra-light carbon composite, wind-optimized, with custom signal shielding and onboard Gen-3 compute for adaptive real-time positioning ? We also built a custom RTK (Real-Time Kinematic) correction network tuned specifically for NYC’s vertical terrain — overcoming GPS multipath distortion from reflective glass and magnetic interference from steel structures. Each drone held sub-5cm precision, dynamically syncing across a mesh network that adapted to shifting winds and RF noise in real time. All of it — the precision, the motion, the timing — ran on something special we’ve been developing called Helios Protocol. And yes, this all took place in one of the most tightly restricted pieces of airspace in the country. Every detail was cleared, calculated, and executed with zero room for error. Huge thanks to @empirestatebldg , @nypd @homeland.security__ @newyorkcity.explore @newyorkermag @newyorkers Massive challenge. Custom hardware. One massive ape and an unforgettable moment in the sky."
item.dc:creator: lydecker17

Pinup Tax "You're a vampire, Michael! My own brother, a damn blood-sucking vampire! You wait 'til Mom finds out, buddy!" - Sam Emerson, Lost Boys All year I make things (blankets, scarves, etc.) to give out to the homeless in the winter. I do this with mostly donated leftover yarn or yarn bought with donated gift cards or money. Starting up on this year's stuff. If you'd like to help and send leftover yarn, DM for address. If you want to send a gift card for Michaels or Amazon, or send some money on Paypal, my email address is sewergoddess@gmail.com Thanks for reading!
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Fuck fuck fuck
item.description: Lost my job of 12 years today. Zero notice. I’m still in the denial/anger phase of grief. I’m also wine drunk already at 7pm Eastern. Fuuuuuuuck.

item.title: OK, that was a well done burn
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Definitely NOT an improvement. Give us the old Library back.
item.description: Don't get me wrong... access to GIPHY is probably a plus for some folks. BUT, now we don't have all the Imgur specific graphics we loved, particularly for Upvotes, Downvotes, Sad, Thumbs-up, etc. It's all gone. The Reaction GIF interface on IOS has always been a kludge. Even before this update, it was far too annoying to use (load) a graphic from my own Images Gallery to use on IOS. Everything from my desktop images should already be available automatically. (Not that the Desktop interface is spectacular either, but it is at least workable). However, on IOS, clunky as it was, at least the stock Imgur Reaction GIF's were fast and easy to use, on-topic by category, and served the purpose. Most of what you get when you "search" Giphy is lame. Adding Giphy COULD be a feature, if it was an ADDITIONAL collection and we were still able to access the Imgur graphics by category.
item.dc:creator: RetrogradeLlama

item.title: Railwaying is serious business, 3 piece suit required
item.dc:creator: Cliperinoposterino

item.title: Backlogged memes: fit check
item.description:
2025 mood. If we don’t rebel against capitalism soon I swear to god Edit: behold, 900+ protests this Saturday to go to https://thepeopledissent.substack.com/p/1-day-1-million-protestors-1-list?r=4any9b
Dying laughing. Might buy it on title alone. As an author I have no chance of competing with this and I should just give up lol
Same with the “humans are inherently violent” shit, nonviolence has repeatedly been selected for in favor of community and that’s why you don’t punch Karen at work, you just talk shit about her behind her back
I hope the pixels come out in this one
I wonder this like twelve times a day frankly. A man mouths off and I’m like who tf is dating you and does she know you’re taking that tone with me???
Glad all the autistics collectively came together to say April fools is the worst yesterday. It is and we’re right and that’s called community baby
Me with the book (my debut came out Tuesday all the info is here theorphanscode.com ) but I made the mistake of reading the arc reviews and WOOF. my heart. They weren’t bad just… it took 20 years to write this dumb book…. Idk man I am so tired and tempted to give up frankly because book 2 is giving me hell
This works and also makes you happier so like. Why tf are men still listening to Andrew Tate
Not a pilot ANYMORE. because of the crashes
Once I learn how to focus it’s over for you bitches
And yet the thought Burroughs into my mind on the daily
Parenting pages smh
If you have a wheelchair you get a free pass to run over anyone you want I don’t make the rules
I don’t miss physical stores that much (most of them did it to themselves) but… yeah.
Pretty sure it is reality. All the art Pinterest recommends to me is AI. Half the search results are AI. can’t tell which books are AI anymore. I hate it. Can we all just make reality better or something?
This guy pissed me off and then slid back into my DMs and was like I wanna make it up to you and I was like ok read my book and he was like…. I don’t read tho…. “If he wanted to he would” is so real
Definitely printers. Also surprisingly airbrushes. Those things are a menace if they sense stress
Lines that go sooooo hard for no reason
I am a sucker for “hang on let me google it… ok yeah that’s funny”
Mel medarda I am seriously so mad I slept on arcane I wanna be part of that fandom so bad I am obsessed
Tempted to do this to my cats just so they know how it feels to have something break your fucking concentration all day long
This game is the key to a healthy marriage (being left alone time in balance with togetherness time) (parallel play counts as both)
I hear so many people complain about stress and jobs as if they’re the only one. Nnnnnope it’s everybody now can we PLEASE. FUCKING. RIOT.
I am so totally shocked at this turn of events. Shocked I say.
Someone told me to go unalive myself once and I just burst out laughing like what kind of 13 year old shit is that
I do this on the regular. It’s only a problem once they’re published lol
He really does I showed my husband a meme implying Jace and viktor are lovers and he just stared at it for 30 full seconds and then went ohhhhhhhh it’s saying they’re gay and I’m like OF COURSE THEY FUCKING ARE Anyway I need more of those memes
Supernatural, for the record
These just made me lol
If that was an option there’d be nothing but gaps in my resume
I wanna be the kind of bitch that’s like “you can call me day or night and I’ll be there” but let’s be real my phone hasn’t made a single sound since 2008 and I have almost every apps notifications turned off I ain’t gonna be there
I should really watch the rest of this series
The problem is I’m super liberal so I offend conservatives by existing and the rest of yall are sure to find something I’m doing wrong once I go through the Rolodex of my beliefs and behaviors
I don’t do either. I’m holding grudges so ancient and complex I need a Greek chorus to explain them
Took a screenshot when it hit 69. Nice.
NO SHE FUCKING DOES NOT
Behold! My book! And no one @ me about the thumb ok that isn’t my hand. I don’t have my copy yet. But I’m proud of it and it looks so beautiful. Can’t wait to get my copy and show off the interior illustrations I did!
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious
